claims.claim: Using a custom GPT-2 execution runner that selectively repeats attention-only, MLP-only, or full-block submodules at target layers, we measure probe negative log-likelihood (NLL) across two experimental phases.

evidence_refs.quote: # Partial-Module Repeat-Your-Submodule: Decomposing Layer Repeats into Submodule Repeats for Quality Preservation in Transformer Language Models

claims.claim: In an initial 10-probe single-layer sweep, attention-only repeats consistently produced smaller NLL degradation than full-layer repeats, and one configuration (attention-only at layer 2) appeared to slightly improve over baseline (ΔNLL = −0.0130).
